segments.text: When he finished praying in a certain place, one of his disciples said to him,
Lord, teach us to pray, just as John also taught his disciples.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He said to them,
When you pray, say,‘Our Father in heaven, may your name be kept holy. May your Kingdom come. May your will be done on earth, as it is in heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Give us day by day our daily bread.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Forgive us our sins, for we ourselves also forgive everyone who is indebted to us. Bring us not into temptation, but deliver us from the evil one.’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He said to them,
Which of you, if you go to a friend at midnight and tell him, ‘Friend, lend me three loaves of bread,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: for a friend of mine has come to me from a journey, and I have nothing to set before him,’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: and he from within will answer and say, ‘Don’t bother me. The door is now shut, and my children are with me in bed. I can’t get up and give it to you’?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I tell you, although he will not rise and give it to him because he is his friend, yet because of his persistence, he will get up and give him as many as he needs.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “I tell you, keep asking, and it will be given you. Keep seeking, and you will find. Keep knocking, and it will be opened to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For everyone who asks receives. He who seeks finds. To him who knocks it will be opened.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “Which of you fathers, if your son asks for bread, will give him a stone? Or if he asks for a fish, he won’t give him a snake instead of a fish, will he?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Or if he asks for an egg, he won’t give him a scorpion, will he?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you then, being evil, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He was casting out a demon, and it was mute. When the demon had gone out, the mute man spoke; and the multitudes marveled.
But some of them said,
He casts out demons by Beelzebul, the prince of the demons.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Others, testing him, sought from him a sign from heaven.
But he, knowing their thoughts, said to them,
Every kingdom divided against itself is brought to desolation. A house divided against itself falls.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: If Satan also is divided against himself, how will his kingdom st and? For you say that I cast out demons by Beelzebul.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: But if I cast out demons by Beelzebul, by whom do your children cast them out? Therefore they will be your judges.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: But if I by God’s finger cast out demons, then God’s Kingdom has come to you.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: “When the strong man, fully armed, guards his own dwelling, his goods are safe.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: But when someone stronger attacks him and overcomes him, he takes from him his whole armor in which he trusted, and divides his plunder.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: “He who is not with me is against me. He who doesn’t gather with me scatters.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: The unclean spirit, when he has gone out of the man, passes through dry places, seeking rest; and finding none, he says, ‘I will turn back to my house from which I came out.’
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: When he returns, he finds it swept and put in order.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: Then he goes and takes seven other spirits more evil than himself, and they enter in and dwell there. The last state of that man becomes worse than the first.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: It came to pass, as he said these things, a certain woman out of the multitude lifted up her voice and said to him,
Blessed is the womb that bore you, and the breasts which nursed you!
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: But he said,
On the contrary, blessed are those who hear the word of God, and keep it.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: When the multitudes were gathering together to him, he began to say,
This is an evil generation. It seeks after a sign. No sign will be given to it but the sign of Jonah the prophet.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: For even as Jonah became a sign to the Ninevites, so the Son of Man will also be to this generation.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: The Queen of the South will rise up in the judgment with the men of this generation and will condemn them, for she came from the ends of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon; and behold, one greater than Solomon is here.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: The men of Nineveh will st and up in the judgment with this generation, and will condemn it, for they repented at the preaching of Jonah; and behold, one greater than Jonah is here.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: “No one, when he has lit a lamp, puts it in a cellar or under a basket, but on a st and, that those who come in may see the light.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: The lamp of the body is the eye. Therefore when your eye is good, your whole body is also full of light; but when it is evil, your body also is full of darkness.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: Therefore see whether the light that is in you isn’t darkness.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: If therefore your whole body is full of light, having no part dark, it will be wholly full of light, as when the lamp with its bright shining gives you light.
segments.speaker: he, knowing their thoughts,

segments.text: Now as he spoke, a certain Pharisee asked him to dine with him. He went in and sat at the table.
When the Pharisee saw it, he marveled that he had not first washed himself before dinner.
The Lord said to him,
Now you Pharisees cleanse the outside of the cup and of the platter, but your inward part is full of extortion and wickedness.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: You foolish ones, didn’t he who made the outside make the inside also?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: But give for gifts to the needy those things which are within, and behold, all things will be clean to you.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: But woe to you Pharisees! For you tithe mint and rue and every herb, but you bypass justice and God’s love. You ought to have done these, and not to have left the other undone.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Woe to you Pharisees! For you love the best seats in the synagogues and the greetings in the marketplaces.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Woe to you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! For you are like hidden graves, and the men who walk over them don’t know it.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: One of the lawyers answered him,
Teacher, in saying this you insult us also.
segments.speaker: One of the lawyers

segments.text: He said,
Woe to you lawyers also! For you load men with burdens that are difficult to carry, and you yourselves won’t even lift one finger to help carry those burdens.
segments.speaker: One of the lawyers

segments.text: Woe to you! For you build the tombs of the prophets, and your fathers killed them.
segments.speaker: One of the lawyers

segments.text: So you testify and consent to the works of your fathers. For they killed them, and you build their tombs.
segments.speaker: One of the lawyers

segments.text: Therefore also the wisdom of God said, ‘I will send to them prophets and apostles; and some of them they will kill and persecute,
segments.speaker: One of the lawyers

segments.text: that the blood of all the prophets, which was shed from the foundation of the world, may be required of this generation,
segments.speaker: One of the lawyers

segments.text: from the blood of Abel to the blood of Zachariah, who perished between the altar and the sanctuary.’ Yes, I tell you, it will be required of this generation.
segments.speaker: One of the lawyers

segments.text: Woe to you lawyers! For you took away the key of knowledge. You didn’t enter in yourselves, and those who were entering in, you hindered.
segments.speaker: One of the lawyers

segments.text: As he said these things to them, the scribes and the Pharisees began to be terribly angry, and to draw many things out of him,
lying in wait for him, and seeking to catch him in something he might say, that they might accuse him.
